{"query":"Sundar Pichai Alphabet proposed pay package amount 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1742,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"Google and Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai has received one of the largest pay packages in corporate history. His total compensation for 2026 has been approved at a staggering ₹63,000 crore (approximately $7.5 billion), driven largely by performance-based stock awards and long-term incentives.Mar 16, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/07/google-just-gave-sundar-pichai-a-692m-pay-package/","title":"Google just gave Sundar Pichai a $692M pay package | TechCrunch","content":"Google just gave Sundar Pichai a $692M pay package
Sundar Pichai’s new pay package could be worth $692 million.
Both have been snapping up lavish Miami properties, widely seen as a response to California’s proposed Billionaire Tax Act — a ballot initiative targeting the state’s roughly 200 billionaires with a one-time 5% levy on net worth exceeding $1 billion."},{"url":"https://www.france24.com/en/live-news/20260307-google-gives-ceo-new-pay-deal-worth-up-to-692-million","title":"Google gives CEO new pay deal worth up to $692 million","content":"Google gives CEO new pay deal worth up to $692 million
New York (AFP) – The CEO of Google and its parent company Alphabet could earn up to $692 million over the next three years under a new compensation plan published Friday by the US Securities and Exchange Commission.
The deal would make Sundar Pichai, who has been chief executive of Google since 2015 and of Alphabet since 2019, one of the highest paid CEOs in the world.
Under the plan, Pichai's three-year salary of $6 million, or $2 million per year, would remain unchanged."},{"url":"https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/GOOG/8-k-alphabet-inc-reports-material-event-49ff9edf3c38.html","title":"Alphabet details new 2026 equity package for CEO | GOOG 8-K Filing","content":"Alphabet approved a new triennial equity package for Sundar Pichai while keeping his salary at $2,000,000 and no annual bonus.
One tranche measures performance over 2026–2027 and another over 2026–2028.
On March 4, 2026, the Leadership Development, Inclusion and Compensation Committee (the “Committee”) of the Board of Directors of Alphabet Inc.
(“Alphabet”) approved compensation for Sundar Pichai, Chief Executive Officer of Alphabet and Google LLC (“CEO”).
Pichai was granted two tranches of Alphabet PSUs with a target value of $63,000,000 each.
The target number of PSUs was calculated by dividing the target value of the total PSU grant by the average closing price of Alphabet’s Class C capital stock during the month of February 2026 (the “Average Closing Price”).
Pichai to receive one share of Alphabet’s Class C capital stock.
Pichai to receive one Common Unit of Waymo LLC and Wing Aviation LLC, respectively, subject to the terms and conditions of the applicable award agreement and the transfer restrictions and other terms under the applicable governing documents."},{"url":"https://mlq.ai/news/alphabet-approves-multi-year-compensation-plan-for-ceo-sundar-pichai-valued-at-up-to-692-million/","title":"Alphabet Approves Multi-Year Compensation Plan for CEO Sundar Pichai Valued at Up to $692 Million | MLQ News","content":"Awards vest based on performance metrics over 2026-2028, ranging from 0% to 200% of target.
Alphabet Inc. approved a new three-year compensation package for CEO Sundar Pichai on March 4, 2026, with a potential value of up to $692 million, according to an SEC filing released March 6.
The package maintains Pichai's $2 million annual salary and includes performance-based equity awards linked to Alphabet's stock, Waymo, and Wing.
Pichai's annual salary remains $2 million, unchanged since 2020, with no annual bonus.
The approval comes amid Alphabet's strong Q4 results, with profit up 30% to $34.5 billion and revenue up 18% to $113.8 billion."}]}

Instead, Alphabet has structured the package around triennial equity awards: two tranches of performance stock units with a target value of $63m each, $84m in restricted stock units, and separate “bet performance units” in Waymo and Wing with target values of about $130m and $45m, respectively. In the filing, the company said Waymo and Wing had made strong progress under his supervision and that incentivising him to develop those operations was in shareholders’ interests. Per a filing first spied by the FT, Alphabet has structured a three-year deal","score":0.91137725,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/GOOG/8-k-alphabet-inc-reports-material-event-49ff9edf3c38.html","title":"Alphabet details new 2026 equity package for CEO | GOOG 8-K Filing","content":"# Massive new equity awards for Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) CEO Sundar Pichai. **Alphabet Inc.** has approved a new triennial equity compensation package for CEO Sundar Pichai, while keeping his annual salary at **$2,000,000** and continuing to make him ineligible for an annual bonus. The package includes two tranches of Alphabet performance stock units (PSUs), each with a target value of **$63,000,000**, tied to Alphabet’s total shareholder return relative to S&P 100 companies over performance periods spanning 2026–2027 and 2026–2028. He also receives Alphabet restricted stock units (GSUs) with an on-target value of **$84,000,000**, vesting gradually over three years. In addition, Pichai is granted Waymo and Wing bet performance units (BPUs) with target values of approximately **$130,000,000** and **$45,000,000**, respectively. These vest after a three-year performance period only if per-unit values at Waymo LLC and Wing Aviation LLC increase, and can also range from 0%–200% of target. ### What are Waymo and Wing bet performance units (BPUs) in Alphabet’s (GOOG) filing?","score":0.9088853,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://fortune.com/2026/03/10/google-ceo-sundar-pichai-692-million-compensation-waymo-wing-success","title":"Google CEO Sundar Pichai's $692M pay package hinges on two Google moonshots | Fortune","content":"# Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai’s new $692 million compensation package hinges on the success of two Google moonshots that aren’t making any money. Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai's compensation will be largely dependent on the success of Waymo and Wing. Google and Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai could be getting a $692 million payday in the next three years, but that depends on the success of two moonshot companies that are operating at a loss. However, according to an SEC filing posted on March 6, about half of Pichai’s compensation is tied to the success of Alphabet’s robotaxi service Waymo and drone delivery service Wing, two companies which so far, are costing Alphabet to operate. “The grant of Waymo and Wing BPUs further supports Alphabet’s long-standing goal of investing in new technologies and reflects Mr. Pichai’s critical role as Alphabet CEO in overseeing its Other Bets,”  the company wrote in the March filing.","score":0.9075175,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/tech_x/comments/1ro1b02/google_approved_a_new_pay_package_for_ceo_sundar","title":"Google approved a new pay package for CEO Sundar Pichai worth up to ...","content":"Alphabet's massive pay bet: Sundar Pichai could earn up to $692 million ... 2026 salary cap in the range of $301.2 million to $305.7","score":0.8925721,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.89,"request_id":"61ca9c55-0373-49d9-bb13-74234861ad9a"}
